description: Geometric computation engine. Symmetry detection, spatial grids, optimization, and transformation — the computational substrate for converting geometric representations into binary structures.

symmetry_detector.role: Detect and classify symmetry patterns in geometric structures
symmetry_detector.description: Identifies rotational, reflective, and translational symmetries. Maps directly to Principle P01 (Symmetry). Symmetry detection IS the first principle check.

geometric_solver.description: Constraint satisfaction over geometric structures. Parallels Rosetta's constraint_agent.py but operates on spatial geometry rather than symbolic ontology.

geometric_transformer_engine.role: Core transformation engine — geometric to binary
geometric_transformer_engine.description: The bridge concept itself: geometric representations → binary computational structures. Information (F03) is preserved across the transform; geometry (F09) provides the encoding basis.

spatial_grid.role: Spatial grid data structure for organizing geometric data
spatial_grid.description: Cubic grid for spatial indexing. Matter (F08) provides the containment structure. Enables efficient spatial queries.

kt_annealer.role: Simulated annealing optimization on geometric landscapes
kt_annealer.description: Optimization via thermal annealing. Energy-Thermo (F05) is the governing family. Finds low-energy configurations in geometric search spaces.

simd_optimizer.role: SIMD vectorization for parallel geometric operations
simd_optimizer.description: Parallel computation on geometric data. Engineering (F11) optimization applied to batch octahedral state operations.

magnonic_sublayer.description: Magnonic (spin-wave) computation layer. Particle physics (F10) provides the theoretical basis. Physical substrate for octahedral state read/write via Zeeman coupling.

rosetta_connections.constraint_agent_parallel: Engine/geometric_solver.py parallels src/rosetta_shape_core/constraint_agent.py — both solve constraint systems, one spatial, one symbolic
rosetta_connections.symmetry_principle: Engine/symmetry_detector.py implements PRINCIPLE.P01 computationally — detecting symmetry IS the first principle
rosetta_connections.optimization_physics: Engine/kt_annealer.py implements AXIOM.ENERGY_CONSERVATION in search — the annealing schedule IS thermodynamic cost
